summary: EXP-490 authored. ISS-2318 (moderate, curmudgeon hole 7 of SEC-part2b-stratification-paragraph.c1): closing sentence of §2b.1 relabelling-axis paragraph softened from causal-attribution ('avoids exactly') to structural framing. Active-avoidance reading deferred to the relabels_standard=true pattern (same paragraph) and the SC hardcoded-to-pass pattern (next paragraph), both of which carry the load-bearing weight more cleanly than a verdict-stratified count. One find-replace patch in data/sections.json:part2b.html — exact occurrence verified (count=1). Kernel of truth acknowledged: publicly-available data feeds (NOAA, USGS, NASA Besselian elements) explain WHERE the dome monitors; the dome-defender response 'we monitor what has APIs' is genuinely on the table for the bare stratification count. Action: apply patch P1, run tests, close ISS-2318.
